control_summary: Default policy is disabled and local matching continues
Digital onboarding PDS access DSPT secure-network and use-case refs must be complete
Legal-basis evidence is required before lookup
Endpoint and credential secret refs are explicit gates
Only approved route families can request PDS enrichment
Adapter success writes normalized provenance-aware PDS snapshot
Binding mutation is prohibited and IdentityBindingAuthority remains the only binding authority
Fresh cache can return bounded snapshot without provider call
Stale cache is marked stale and cannot masquerade as fresh evidence
Timeout fails deterministic local matching only
Parsing drift fails local-only without storing raw payload
Notifications queue refresh signals and never mutate local state
